flows.name: Register
steps: you will land in Secure Access page, Enter the password to continue-> give this password FiP93&@1U94L and click continue button
click Create an Account which is a hyperlink placed under this text "Login below or "
You will land in Find Your Company page,type lamb in Company Name field and click Search Button(this may take upto 2 mins) please wait for the search results
scroll down to see the search results and click the select button of the 1st result
Click Confirm & Create Your Account button
Fill the Personal Information fields - First Name, Last Name, Email Address, Email Confirmation, Phone Number,
In Account Information section, fill password(Make sure to read the Password Requirements: and fill tjhe password accordingly) , Confirm Password, Select user type and Click Create Account button
